title: Mock Catalogs of Strongly Lensed Gravitational Waves via a Halo Model Approach with Space-borne Detectors
summary: Future space-borne gravitational-wave (GW) detectors, such as LISA and DECIGO, are expected to detect a large number of GW events, a fraction of which may be strongly lensed by intervening galaxies or galaxy clusters. In this work, we develop a comprehensive framework to simulate strongly lensed GWs in the context of space-borne detectors. Based on realistic astrophysical models for both the source population and the lens distribution, we construct mock catalogs of lensed GW events, referred to as \textbf{GW-LMC-Space}. Our results show that, for a four-year LISA observation, the expected number of lensed events ranges from $0$ to $131$, depending on the adopted formation model of massive black hole binaries (MBHBs). The corresponding lensing probability for MBHBs can reach up to $\sim 0.3\%$. For DECIGO, we find that the number of lensed events in a one-year observation is expected to lie in the range of $0$--$44$, with a lensing probability of $\sim 0.15\%$ for stellar-mass binary black holes (BBHs), binary neutron stars (BNSs), and neutron star--black hole binaries (NSBHs). We further show that the overlap of lensed signals is a common feature in space-borne detectors, which can significantly affect both the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimation and event identification. These results highlight the importance of accounting for signal overlap in the analysis of strongly lensed GW events in future space-borne GW observations.

title: A differentiable forward model for weakly perturbed stellar streams: substructure forecasts from density and kinematics spectra
summary: Stellar streams are a promising way to gravitationally detect low-mass substructure, since their low dynamical temperature makes them retain the imprint of weak gravitational perturbations. We develop a fast, differentiable forward model for perturbed stellar streams in the diffusion regime, where the stream is heated by many small velocity kicks rather than by a few strong encounters. The substructure population enters only through its power spectrum, so the computational cost is insensitive to the number of perturbers, and alternative dark matter models and/or baryonic perturbers can be explored by changing this single input. We validate the simulations against analytical predictions, then forecast the sensitivity of a GD-1-like stream to the substructure power spectrum, adding to the stream density the full kinematics, both proper motions and the radial velocity. Kinematic information tightens the constraints by a factor of $\sim 3$-$5$ relative to density alone, improving the precision on the dark matter free-streaming cutoff scale from $\sim 1.2$ dex to $\sim 0.25$ dex at a fiducial value of $M_{\rm hm} = 10^6 M_\odot$ for a $5$ Gyr stream. A single well-measured stream could thus constrain dark matter competitively with current limits from strong lensing and satellite counts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速、可微分的恒星流前向模型，用于在扩散 regime 下探测低质量暗物质子结构。通过引入子结构功率谱，模型的計算成本不依赖于扰动体数量。研究表明，结合恒星流的完整运动学信息（自行和径向速度）可将约束精度提升3-5倍，单个流即可达到与强引力透镜和卫星计数相当的暗物质约束能力。
AI.motivation: 恒星流是探测低质量暗物质子结构的理想工具，因其低动力学温度能保留微弱引力扰动的印记。现有方法在处理大量小速度冲量扰动时计算成本高昂，且难以同时考虑多种暗物质模型和重子扰动体。
AI.method: 开发了一个快速、可微分的恒星流前向模型，采用扩散 regime 描述，将子结构群体通过其功率谱引入，使得计算成本不依赖于扰动体数量。模型同时纳入了恒星流的密度和完整运动学信息（自行和径向速度）。
AI.result: 运动学信息将约束精度提升约3-5倍，将暗物质自由流截止尺度的精度从~1.2 dex提升至~0.25 dex（假设M_hm=10^6 M⊙，流年龄5 Gyr）。单个GD-1类恒星流即可达到与强引力透镜和卫星计数相竞争的暗物质约束能力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为利用恒星流约束暗物质子结构提供了高效工具，运动学数据能显著提升约束力，单个恒星流即可提供竞争性的暗物质约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Geometry of the velocity injection formalism, adapted from Ref. [ 19 , Fig. 1] . The stellar stream (black line) runs along \(\hat{\bm{r}}\) , and the blue arrows represent the relative velocity field \(\bm{u}\) of the dark matter substructure environment. A star at position \(\bm{r}\) receives a velocity impulse \(\Delta\bm{v}\) , decomposed into a component \(\Delta v_{\parallel}\) parallel to the stream and a component \(\Delta\bm{v}_{\perp}\) transverse to it.

Figure 2: Illustration of the velocity kick implementation at a single kick time \(t_{k}\) , from an actual simulation realization. (Left:) The stream (blue points) within the 3D grid used to discretize the substructure density field. The grid is aligned with the instantaneous stream velocity direction and sized to encompass the stream extent with additional padding. The small golden box indicates the region shown in the middle and right panels. (Center:) The velocity kick field \(\Delta\bm{v}(\bm{x})\) , defined in Eq. ( 1 ), within the highlighted region, averaged over its \(z\) -depth. The color encodes the kick amplitude \(|\Delta\bm{v}|\) and the arrows indicate the kick direction at each grid node at the middle of the \(z\) -slab. Stream stars are overlaid as points. The resolution of the grid is \(0.05\) kpc. (Right:) The kick field evaluated at the irregular star positions via NUFFT, yielding an individual velocity kick \(\Delta\bm{v}(\bm{x}_{\star})\) for each star. Marker colors reflect the kick amplitude.

Figure 3: Validation of the simulation framework against analytical predictions in the idealized (non-orbital) setup. A uniform stream of \(N_{*}=10^{5}\) stars spanning \(L=12\) kpc is evolved for \(t_{age}=7\) Gyr under diffusive velocity kicks, with initial velocity dispersion \(\sigma_{0}=0.365\) km s -1 and zero stream velocity. Three substructure scenarios are shown, with \(M_{min}=10^{5}\,{M}_{\odot}\) and \(M_{max}=10^{6}\) (red), \(10^{7}\) (blue), and \(10^{8}\,{M}_{\odot}\) (green). All power spectra are evaluated at the final time \(t_{age}\) . Left: velocity-injection power spectrum \(kP_{\Delta v,\parallel}(k)\) . Center: dimensionless stream density power spectrum \(kP^{*}(k)\) . Right: stream velocity power spectrum \(kP^{*}_{v,\parallel}(k)\) . Points show the mean over 100 realizations; error bars indicate the standard deviation of the mean. The shot noise floor has been subtracted from the simulation results. Dashed curves show the analytical predictions (Eq. ( 4 ) for the left panel); shaded bands in the center and right panels bracket the predictions for the density and velocity power spectra (Eqs. ( 5 ) and ( 6 )) with \(D=0\) and \(D=D(2\pi/L)\) (see text). Dotted lines indicate the shot noise level. Vertical dashed lines mark the minimum wavenumber \(k_{min}=2\pi/L\) , the free-streaming scale \(1/(\sigma_{0}t_{age})\) , and the Nyquist frequency \(k_{Nyquist}\) .

Figure 4: Evolution of the position perturbation \(\delta x_{\parallel}/|\Delta\bm{v}|\) along the orbital velocity, normalized by the radial orbit period \(T_{r}\) , in response to a single velocity kick \(\Delta\bm{v}\) applied at \(t=0{\ Myr}\) to a star on the unperturbed progenitor orbit. Three kick directions are shown: parallel to the orbital velocity ( \(\hat{\bm{e}}_{\parallel}\) , red) and along two perpendicular directions ( \(\hat{\bm{e}}_{\perp 1}\) , blue; \(\hat{\bm{e}}_{\perp 2}\) , green). Only the parallel kick induces a secular drift. Dashed lines show the raw separation between perturbed and unperturbed orbits, whose oscillation amplitude grows due to the periodic expansion and contraction of co-orbiting material. Solid lines show the separation in the co-orbiting frame, rescaled by \(\langle v_{orb}\rangle/v_{orb}\) , showing a clean secular trend matching Eq. ( 7 ) (dotted).

Figure 5: Quantities used as inputs to the analytical predictions of Sec. II.3 . Left: distribution of the co-scaling factor \(\omega\equiv v_{orb}/\langle v_{orb}\rangle\) sampled over the stream age. The dashed vertical line marks the present-day value \(\omega_{0}=1.33\) , and the dotted line indicates \(\omega=1\) . Center: distribution of the kick efficiency \(\Lambda\) (see Eq. ( 7 )), obtained by applying velocity kicks at uniformly sampled orbital phases and measuring the resulting secular drift rate. Right: ratio of the local to global velocity dispersion \(\sigma_{0}/\sigma_{tot}\) as a function of normalized position \(x/(\sigma_{tot}\,t_{age})\) along the stream. The black curve shows the analytical prediction of Ref. [ 19 , Eq. I3] . Grey and blue markers show unperturbed and perturbed ( \(M_{max}=10^{7.5}\,{M}_{\odot}\) ) simulations respectively, averaged over 25 realizations, with error bars indicating the standard deviation across realizations. Both arms of the stream are shown.

Figure 6: Post-processing of a single stream simulation into a linear density contrast field, for a realization with \(t_{age}=9\) Gyr, \(\Delta t=180\) Myr, and \(M_{max}=10^{7.5}\,{M}_{\odot}\) . Left: perturbed and unperturbed streams in the \(x\) – \(y\) plane of the Galactic frame, colored by arc-length \(|s|\) from the progenitor (star symbol). The unperturbed stream is shifted by \(-5\) kpc in \(x\) for visibility. The dotted grey curve shows the progenitor orbital track. Center: linear density \(\rho(s)\) as a function of arc-length for the perturbed (light blue) and unperturbed (dark blue) streams. The dotted curve shows the third-order polynomial fit to the perturbed density. Shaded regions indicate excluded zones: the low-density tails and a \(\pm 0.5\) kpc buffer around the progenitor. Right: two definitions of the density contrast computed from the perturbed stream. The unperturbed-based estimator \(\delta^{*}_{u}=\rho_{p}/\rho_{u}-1\) (dark red) uses the matched unperturbed stream to remove the large-scale density profile. The polynomial-based estimator \(\delta^{*}_{3}=\rho_{p}/{poly}_{3}(\rho_{p})-1\) (red) fits and divides out a smooth baseline from the perturbed density alone, as would be done in observational analyses.

Figure 7: Comparison of the shot noise-subtracted stream density power spectrum \(kP^{*}(k)\) from realistic simulations against analytical predictions, for both density contrast estimators (rows), three substructure mass ranges (columns), and three stream ages (different colors). Upper row: unperturbed-based estimator \(\delta^{*}_{u}\) . Lower row: polynomial-based estimator \(\delta^{*}_{3}\) . Points show the median power across \(N_{sim}\) retained realizations at 11 logarithmically spaced wavenumber bins, with error bars spanning the 16th–84th percentiles. Shaded bands bracket the analytical predictions computed with \(D=D(2\pi/L)\) using \(\sigma_{0}-\sigma_{0,std}\) and \(D=0\) using \(\sigma_{0}+\sigma_{0,std}\) , where \(\sigma_{0,std}\) is the standard deviation of the local velocity dispersion across realizations. Dotted lines indicate the median shot noise floor \(P_{shot}=L/N_{\star,sel}\) across realizations, where \(N_{\star,sel}\) is the number of stars falling within the selected stream region. The number of retained simulations \(N_{sim}\) (out of 200) is reported in each panel for each stream age; realizations where \(|\delta^{*}|>5\) are discarded for this comparison as the stream is too perturbed to enable a sensible comparison with the analytical prescription.

Figure 8: Construction of the kinematic contrast fields for a single stream realization ( \(t_{age}=5\) Gyr, \(M_{hm}=10^{6}\,{M}_{\odot}\) ). Rows show, from top to bottom, the two proper motion components, \(\mu_{\phi_{1}}\) and \(\mu_{\phi_{2}}\) , and the radial velocity, \(v_{r}\) . Left: stars in the on-sky stream frame \((\phi_{1},\phi_{2})\) , colored by the corresponding kinematic quantity. Center: the one-dimensional profile of each field binned along arc-length \(s\) (blue), with the first-order polynomial baseline overlaid. Shaded regions mark the excluded low-density tails and the \(\pm 0.5\) kpc buffer around the progenitor. Right: the resulting contrast fields, \(\delta={field}-{poly}_{1}({field})\) for the kinematic fields, from which the power spectra are computed.

title: JWST Absorption-Line Analysis of UV-Bright Galaxies at $z=7.2-10.6$: Early Chemical Enrichment Traced by C, O, Mg, Al, Si, and Fe
summary: We investigate UV absorption lines tracing cool gas in eight bright ($-21.9<M_\mathrm{UV}<-20.5$) galaxies at $z=7.2-10.6$ using deep JWST/NIRSpec medium-resolution spectra homogeneously selected from archival data. We identify multiple absorption lines of low-ionization species (LIS) in five galaxies, while the remaining three show only one or no significant detections. The average LIS equivalent widths $\mathrm{EW_{LIS}}$ indicate weaker absorption lines in compact ($r_\mathrm{e}\lesssim 100$ pc) galaxies with high $L_\mathrm{Hβ}/L_\mathrm{UV}$ and $Σ_\mathrm{SFR}$, suggestive of absorption-line suppression due to intense star formation or nuclear activity. We simultaneously fit multiple LIS lines, accounting for both covering fraction $C_f$ and column density $N$, and find that the five galaxies follow the local $C_f$-$N$ relation. Through the LIS-line fitting, we derive chemical abundance ratios. The five galaxies have abundance ratios similar to those of damped Ly$α$ (DLA) systems in the [Si/O]-[C/O] and [Fe/Si]-[Al/Si] planes, suggesting that their absorbing gas is similar to that of DLAs. We find that two galaxies at $z\sim 7$ are already highly Fe-enriched, with $\mathrm{[Fe/Si]}\simeq -0.2$, near the solar abundance ratio. While the high Fe enrichment may originate from early Type-Ia supernovae (SNe Ia) or pair-instability supernovae (PISNe), these two galaxies also show $\mathrm{[Al/Si]}\sim0$, with no signature of the strong odd-even effect expected from PISNe, favoring SNe Ia.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRSpec中分辨率光谱，在5个高红移(z~7-10)亮星系中探测到低电离态吸收线，发现致密恒星形成星系中吸收线被抑制，高Fe丰度更支持Ia型超新星而非对不稳定超新星起源。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移(z=7.2-10.6)亮星系的UV吸收线，追溯早期宇宙冷气体性质和化学演化，探究吸收线与星系物理性质的关系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用从档案数据中均匀选取的深场JWST/NIRSpec中分辨率光谱，研究了8个亮于（-21.9<M_\mathrm{UV}<-20.5）且红移z=7.2-10.6的星系中追踪冷气体的紫外吸收线。我们在5个星系中识别出多条低电离态物种（LIS）的吸收线，而其余3个星系仅有一个或没有显著探测。平均LIS等值宽度\mathrm{EW_{LIS}}表明，在致密（r_\mathrm{e}\lesssim 100 pc）、具有高L_\mathrm{Hβ}/L_\mathrm{UV}和Σ_\mathrm{SFR}的星系中吸收线较弱，这暗示了由于强烈恒星形成或核活动导致的吸收线抑制。我们同时拟合了多条LIS线，同时考虑了覆盖因子C_f和柱密度N，并发现这5个星系遵循局域C_f-N关系。通过LIS线拟合，我们推导出了化学丰度比。这5个星系在[Si/O]-[C/O]和[Fe/Si]-[Al/Si]平面上的丰度比与阻尼Lyα（DLA）系统相似，表明它们的吸收气体与DLA的气体类似。我们发现，两个z~7的星系已经高度富集铁，其\mathrm{[Fe/Si]}\simeq -0.2，接近太阳丰度比。虽然高Fe富集可能源于早期Ia型超新星（SNe Ia）或对不稳定超新星（PISNe），但这两个星系也显示出\mathrm{[Al/Si]}\sim0，没有PISNe预期的强奇偶效应特征，这更倾向于SNe Ia的解释。

title: NEXUS: Abundance, Environments, and Spectral Diversity of Little Red Dots from the NIRSpec MSA Sample
summary: We present a comprehensive study of Little Red Dots (LRDs) at 2.3 < z < 7.4 using NIRCam photometry and NIRSpec MSA/PRISM spectra from the ongoing NEXUS program. Photometric selection combining several commonly adopted methods yields a high completeness of about 85% for LRD selection over this redshift range and for a flux limit of F444W < 26. The overall purity is about 60%, with contamination from emission-line galaxies and normal active galactic nuclei (AGNs), as well as dwarf stars. Most (>90%) of the spectroscopically confirmed LRDs have robust broad-line detection. Our spectroscopic sample of 36 LRDs displays the full range of spectral diversity of LRDs. It includes objects with extreme Balmer breaks similar to the LRD "Cliff", as well as objects with moderately reddened rest-optical continua that can be fit with low-temperature blackbody components in the recent BH* model framework. The broad H$α$ emission is correlated with the continuum emission at 5100 Angstrom, suggesting common origins for these emission components; the narrow [O III] emission, however, is poorly correlated with the optical continuum. We do not find evidence of redshift evolution in these spectral properties. The space density of LRDs declines toward z about 2, opposite to the trend for normal AGNs, although low-luminosity LRDs at z about 2-4 may be more abundant than currently probed by ground-based searches. The clustering of LRDs suggests that they live in dark matter halos of several times $10^{11}\ h^{-1}$ solar masses, albeit with large uncertainties. Overall, these results are consistent with recent observations of LRDs and with the emerging picture of accreting SMBHs enshrouded in dense gas envelopes as the origin of LRDs.

AI.tldr: 本文利用NEXUS项目的NIRCam测光和NIRSpec光谱数据，系统研究了红移2.3-7.4的"小红点"(LRDs)，发现其选择完备性约85%、纯度约60%，大部分具有宽发射线，光谱特征多样，空间密度在z~2处下降，且倾向于存在于约10^11太阳质量的暗物质晕中，支持其源于被稠密气体包裹的吸积超大质量黑洞的模型。
AI.motivation: 对红移2.3-7.4范围内的"小红点"(LRDs)进行系统性的普查研究，以理解其性质、起源及宇宙学演化。
AI.method: 采用NEXUS项目的NIRCam多波段测光和NIRSpec MSA/PRISM光谱数据，结合多种常用方法进行光度选择，并对36个光谱样本进行宽线探测、连续谱拟合、空间密度和成团性分析。
AI.result: LRD选择完备性约85%，纯度约60%；>90%光谱确认LRD具有宽发射线；光谱呈现从极端Balmer断裂到中等红化连续谱的多样性；宽Hα与5100埃连续谱相关，而窄[O III]与连续谱相关性弱；空间密度在z~2下降；成团性表明其居住于约10^11 h^-1太阳质量的暗物质晕中。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持LRD起源于被稠密气体包裹的吸积超大质量黑洞这一主流图像，且其性质在红移2.3-7.4范围内无明显演化，低光度LRD在z~2-4可能比地面巡天揭示的更为普遍。

title: ALMA High-resolution Observation of the HH46/47 Outflow/disk/envelope System
comment: 39 pages, 23 figures. Submitted to ApJ; Comments are welcome
summary: We present 0.1" (~ 50 au) resolution Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) observations of the HH 46/47 molecular outflow and its envelope-disk system. The 1.3 mm continuum emission reveals a compact central source surrounded by a circumbinary disk with substructures. The companion, identified in optical and infrared observations, is not detected in the millimeter continuum but coincides with a local intensity minimum. Two spur-like features extending from the primary source toward the companion are identified and are likely induced by gravitational perturbations from the companion. The envelope-disk system is traced by C18O, SO, H2CO, and CH3OH. C18O primarily traces the extended envelope, while SO probes the inner envelope, and H2CO and CH3OH trace compact, faster-rotating structures near the centrifugal barrier. The observations are well reproduced by a rotating-infalling envelope transitioning to an inner disk at a radius of ~30 au around a 0.3 Msun protostar. The 12CO emission, together with JWST NIRCam images, reveals multiple shell structures in the outflow. Using C18O and 13CO to correct for optical depth, we derive the spatial distributions of outflow mass, momentum, and kinetic energy, as well as their corresponding rates. A model-independent analysis of a well-defined redshifted shell yields its three-dimensional velocity field, showing that the shell expands radially rather than flowing along its surface. Although a transverse velocity gradient is detected, interpreting it as rotation implies an unphysically large magnetic lever arm, disfavoring a direct disk-wind origin. Instead, the shell kinematics support an entrainment scenario.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA高分辨率观测揭示了HH 46/47分子外流及其包层-盘系统的精细结构，包括双星相互作用、旋转内落包层动力学以及外壳层的膨胀运动学特征。
AI.motivation: 通过亚毫米波高分辨率观测，解析HH 46/47系统中包层-盘结构、双星相互作用以及分子外流的详细动力学过程，以理解恒星形成中的物质传输和反馈机制。
AI.method: 使用ALMA 1.3 mm连续谱和多种分子谱线（C18O、SO、H2CO、CH3OH、12CO、13CO）观测，结合JWST NIRCam图像，进行光学深度校正和模型无关的动力学分析。
AI.result: 发现了围绕双星系统的环双星盘中的子结构和两个旋臂状特征；C18O示踪扩展包层，SO示踪内包层，H2CO和CH3OH示踪离心势垒附近的致密快速旋转结构；旋转内落模型拟合得到~30 au的盘半径和0.3 Msun的原恒星；发现外流中多个壳层结构，其中红移壳层呈径向膨胀而非表面流动；横向速度梯度若解释为旋转则导致非物理的磁力臂参数，更支持夹带机制。
AI.conclusion: HH 46/47系统呈现一个从旋转内落包层向内盘（~30 au）过渡的结构，双星引力扰动造成盘中子结构；外流壳层的运动学特征不支持盘风起源，而更符合夹带模型。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了HH 46/47分子外流及其包层-盘系统的0.1角秒（约50天文单位）分辨率阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）观测结果。1.3毫米连续谱发射揭示了一个致密的中心源，周围环绕着一个具有子结构的环双星盘。在光学和红外观测中识别的伴星在毫米连续谱中未被探测到，但恰好位于一个局部强度最小值处。从主星向伴星延伸的两个类似旋臂的特征被识别出来，很可能由伴星的引力扰动引起。包层-盘系统由C18O、SO、H2CO和CH3OH示踪。C18O主要示踪延展的包层，而SO探测内部包层，H2CO和CH3OH示踪靠近离心势垒的致密、快速旋转结构。观测结果很好地再现了一个旋转内落包层，在半径约30天文单位处过渡到围绕一颗0.3太阳质量原恒星的内盘。12CO发射，连同JWST NIRCam图像，揭示了外流中的多个壳层结构。利用C18O和13CO校正光学深度，我们推导出外流质量、动量和动能的空间分布及其相应的速率。对一个定义明确的红移壳层进行的模型无关分析给出了其三维速度场，表明该壳层径向膨胀，而非沿其表面流动。尽管探测到一个横向速度梯度，但将其解释为旋转意味着一个非物理的大磁力臂，不利于直接的盘风起源。相反，壳层运动学支持夹带模型。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，HH 46/47系统呈现一个从旋转内落包层向内盘（~30 au）过渡的结构，双星引力扰动造成盘中子结构；外流壳层的运动学特征不支持盘风起源，而更符合夹带模型。

title: Satellite compaction pathways: environmental drivers shaping dwarf galaxy corpulence in the TNG50 simulation
comment: Accepted for Publication in MNRAS. 22 Pages, 18 Figures (plus 7 Appendix Figures), and 2 Tables (plus 1 Appendix Table)
summary: We explore the physical mechanisms driving dwarf galaxy corpulence, focusing on those that end up as compact satellites. We select dwarf galaxies at $z=0$ with $\log(M_\star/{\rm M}_\odot)$ between 8.4 and 9.2 from the TNG50 hydrodynamical simulation after excluding systems flagged as potentially spurious. Compact dwarfs are defined according to the $z=0$ size-mass relation as those on the lower envelope of its main branch or on its lower-size secondary branch, while "Normal" lie on the main branch spine. We identify two robust compaction pathways and a third, more tentative, channel: 1) Compact satellites that remain rich in dark matter (DM) inhabit poorer environments having fewer mergers, favouring the accretion of lower-angular-momentum gas. This allows gas inflows that drive concentrated inner star formation and compaction, as previously found for centrals. 2) Most DM-poor satellites (which typically end up red and metal-rich for their stellar mass) undergo compaction mainly caused by tidal stripping of outer stars. Their compaction is faster when gas is present, by at least 15 per cent after correcting for the stronger tidal field. 3) For most of our few very metal-rich DM-poor Compact satellites, the major compaction phase begins with a starburst driven by ram pressure compression near first pericentre, even if much of the compaction often occurs during subsequent tidal stripping. As a result, compact dwarf satellites in TNG50 arise through distinct pathways. We discuss how numerical effects can affect this conclusion.

AI.tldr: 本文利用TNG50流体动力学模拟，研究了z=0时恒星质量在10^8.4到10^9.2 M☉之间的矮星系致密化物理机制。发现两条主要致密化路径：（1）富含暗物质的致密卫星通过吸积低角动量气体驱动内部恒星形成而致密化；（2）缺乏暗物质的卫星主要通过潮汐剥离外部恒星而致密化。此外还识别出第三条较不确定的路径：少数富含金属的贫暗物质卫星在首次近心点附近因冲压压缩引发星暴，随后潮汐剥离完成致密化。
AI.motivation: 探索导致矮星系（尤其是最终成为致密卫星的矮星系）变得致密的物理机制，理解不同演化路径的成因。
AI.method: 使用TNG50流体动力学模拟，选取z=0时恒星质量在8.4<log(M⋆/M☉)<9.2范围内的矮星系，排除潜在虚假系统。根据质量-尺寸关系定义致密矮星系（主分支下包络或低尺寸次级分支）和正常矮星系（主分支骨干），分析其演化路径。
AI.result: 识别出三条致密化路径：（1）富含暗物质的致密卫星通过贫乏环境、较少并合、低角动量气体吸积驱动内部恒星形成致密化；（2）贫暗物质的致密卫星主要通过潮汐剥离外部恒星致密化，气体存在时速度加快至少15%；（3）少数贫暗物质且富含金属的致密卫星，致密化始于首次近心点附近由冲压压缩引发的星暴，随后由潮汐剥离完成。
AI.conclusion: TNG50中致密矮卫星通过不同的路径产生，讨论了数值效应对结论的可能影响。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究矮星系致密化的物理机制，使用TNG50模拟，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振、高红移多相气体）不匹配。论文主题为矮星系环境演化，不涉及引力透镜或高红移星系核心科学问题。用户画像中虽有'dark matter'和'starburst'关键词，但权重较低且非核心兴趣。无核心作者匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们探索了驱动矮星系致密化的物理机制，重点关注那些最终成为致密卫星的矮星系。我们从TNG50流体动力学模拟中选取了$z=0$时恒星质量对数$\log(M_\star/{\rm M}_\odot)$在8.4到9.2之间的矮星系，并排除了被标记为可能虚假的系统。致密矮星系根据$z=0$的尺寸-质量关系定义，即位于其主分支下包络或较小尺寸次级分支上的星系，而“正常”星系则位于主分支脊线上。我们识别出两条稳健的致密化路径和第三条更初步的通道：1) 富含暗物质(DM)的致密卫星居住在较贫瘠的环境中，合并事件较少，有利于吸积低角动量气体。这使得气体流入能够驱动集中的内部恒星形成和致密化，正如之前对中央星系所发现的那样。2) 大多数贫暗物质卫星（通常最终呈现红色且相对于其恒星质量富含金属）的致密化主要由外部恒星的潮汐剥离引起。当存在气体时，其致密化速度更快，在修正更强的潮汐场后至少快15%。3) 对于我们少数几个非常富含金属的贫暗物质致密卫星，主要的致密化阶段始于首次近心点附近由冲压压力压缩驱动的星暴，尽管大部分致密化通常发生在随后的潮汐剥离过程中。因此，TNG50中的致密矮卫星通过不同的路径产生。我们讨论了数值效应对这一结论的可能影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：TNG50中致密矮卫星通过不同的路径产生，讨论了数值效应对结论的可能影响。

The vertical segments denote the median values. The purple solid and light brown dashed lines are for DM-rich and DM-poor satellites, respectively.

For comparison, the median trends for central Compact galaxies from Paper I are overlaid as dashed lines. The shaded region around the medians indicates the uncertainty on the median, estimated using bootstraps. The red shaded region in the top panel indicates the redshift-dependent softening length of TNG50-1. The vertical lines mark the median entry epoch of each subsample.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：富暗物质卫星星系（实线）的恒星成分半质量半径（顶部）和内部区域比恒星形成率（sSFR）（底部）的中位演化。作为对比，叠加了来自论文I的中央致密星系的中位趋势（虚线）。中位数周围的阴影区域表示中位数的不确定性，通过自助法估计。顶部面板中的红色阴影区域表示TNG50-1的红移相关软化长度。垂直线标记每个子样本的中位进入时期。

The vertical segments denote the median values.

title: Clumps in a Cocoon: Geometry and Mixing Set the Universal X-ray to H$α$ Surface Brightness Ratio
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to MNRAS Letters
summary: Recent observations reveal a universal X-ray to H$α$ surface-brightness ratio, ${\rm SB}_{\rm X}/{\rm SB}_{\rm Hα}\sim 3$, in galactic winds, ram-pressure stripped tails, and cluster filaments. This is surprising because H$α$ traces cold ($\sim 10^4$ K) gas while X-rays trace much hotter ($\sim 10^{6}$--$10^{7}$ K) gas. Plane-parallel mixing-layer models do not recover this ratio, and can be off by orders of magnitude. Motivated by recent work showing that geometry controls the temperature PDF of multiphase gas (Chen & Oh 2026), we run 3D wind-tunnel simulations in the high density contrast ($χ\sim 10^3$) regime. In this limit, the cold phase shatters into many small H$α$-emitting clumps, while X-ray-emitting gas forms a volume-filling cocoon around them. After smoothing on the tail-width scale, the measured surface-brightness ratio converges to the observed value, which can be understood theoretically. The H$α$ luminosity fraction is set by atomic physics, whereas the X-ray luminosity fraction is set by the residence time of gas in the X-ray-emitting band. This residence time is much shorter than the cooling time at X-ray temperatures, but scales roughly inversely with pressure, suggesting that it is tied to the cooling time at a lower-temperature outlet of the mixing cascade. This framework naturally explains why the observed ratio is order unity, and robust to changes in gas pressure.

AI.tldr: 通过3D风洞模拟，发现高密度对比度下破碎的冷云团与热X射线包层结构的几何排列，使得X射线与Hα的面亮度比稳定在~3，该比值由原子物理和混合级联中的驻留时间决定，而非传统平面混合层模型所预测。
AI.motivation: 观测发现星系风、冲压剥离尾和星系团纤维中X射线与Hα面亮度比普遍约为3，但传统平面混合层模型无法解释这一普适且量级相当的比值。
AI.method: 在密度对比度χ~10^3的高对比度区域内进行3D风洞模拟，研究多相气体的几何结构对温度概率分布函数的影响。
AI.result: 冷相破碎成大量Hα发射的小团块，热相形成体积填充的包层；在尾宽尺度上平滑后，面亮度比收敛到观测值~3。
AI.conclusion: Hα光度分数由原子物理决定，X射线光度分数由气体在X射线发射温度区间的驻留时间决定；该驻留时间远短于X射线温度的冷却时间，但与压力成反比，与混合级联中较低温度出口的冷却时间相关，从而解释了比值为数量级1且对压力变化稳健的原因。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近的观测揭示，在星系风、冲压剥离尾和星系团纤维结构中，X射线与Hα的面亮度比具有普适性，即 ${\rm SB}_{\rm X}/{\rm SB}_{\rm Hα}\sim 3$。这令人惊讶，因为Hα示踪冷气体（约 $10^4$ K），而X射线示踪热得多的气体（约 $10^{6}$--$10^{7}$ K）。平面平行混合层模型无法重现这一比值，且可能相差数个数量级。受近期关于几何结构控制多相气体温度概率密度函数的研究（Chen & Oh 2026）启发，我们在高密度对比度（$χ\sim 10^3$）条件下运行了三维风洞模拟。在此极限下，冷相碎裂成许多微小的Hα发射团块，而X射线发射气体则在其周围形成一个充满空间的茧状结构。在按尾宽尺度平滑后，测得的面亮度比收敛于观测值，这可以从理论上理解。Hα光度分数由原子物理决定，而X射线光度分数由气体在X射线发射温度区间的驻留时间决定。该驻留时间远短于X射线温度下的冷却时间，但大致与压力成反比，表明它与混合级联中较低温度出口的冷却时间相关。这一框架自然地解释了为何观测比值量级为1，且对气体压力的变化具有稳健性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：Hα光度分数由原子物理决定，X射线光度分数由气体在X射线发射温度区间的驻留时间决定；该驻留时间远短于X射线温度的冷却时间，但与压力成反比，与混合级联中较低温度出口的冷却时间相关，从而解释了比值为数量级1且对压力变化稳健的原因。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: H \(\alpha\) ( top ) and X-ray ( bottom ) surface brightness maps for a zoomed-in section of the cloud tail in our wind tunnel simulation. The H \(\alpha\) emitting gas consists of numerous small clumps, while the X-ray emitting gas is volume-filling and forms an elongated, cocoon-like structure that envelopes the H \(\alpha\) emitting clumps. We refer to this morphology as "clumps in a cocoon" throughout this letter.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：风洞模拟中云尾放大区域的H \(\alpha\)（上）和X射线（下）面亮度图。H \(\alpha\) 发射气体由大量小团块组成，而X射线发射气体充满空间，形成一个拉长的茧状结构，包裹着H \(\alpha\) 发射团块。我们在本文中将这种形态称为“茧中团块”。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top : \({SB_{X}/SB_{H\alpha}}\) as a function of resolution. Our fiducial resolution is 16 cells per initial cloud radius, as discussed in § 2 . We perform resolution study by running two additional simulations with \(2\times\) higher and lower resolution. For each simulation, we show the median \({SB_{X}/SB_{H\alpha}}\) after smoothing over Gaussian kernels comparable to the transverse size of the cloud tail. Error bars show 16th and 84th percentiles across the kernels. The horizontal bands indicate the observed ratios for jellyfish tails and cluster filaments. Bottom : \(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\) in the cloud tail as a function of time (normalized by the cloud entrainment time \(t_{entrain}\) ) during cloud evolution. Since surface brightnesses are measured over the same projected tail area, \(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\sim\left.{SB}_{X}\right/{SB}_{H\alpha}\) . Early in the cloud evolution and before the cloud gets shattered , \(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\) is small. However, once the "clumps in a cocoon" morphology analyzed in Fig. 1 develops (green horizontal band), \(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\) approaches the observed value of \(\sim 3\) and remains time-steady after cloud entrainment. We further discuss robustness against cloud evolutionary stage and resolution in § 3.3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上：\({SB_{X}/SB_{H\alpha}}\) 随分辨率的变化。我们的基准分辨率为每个初始云半径16个网格单元，详见第2节。我们通过运行另外两个分辨率分别为 \(2\times\) 更高和更低的模拟来进行分辨率研究。对于每次模拟，我们展示了在与云尾横向尺寸相当的Gaussian核平滑后 \({SB_{X}/SB_{H\alpha}}\) 的中位数。误差棒表示各核的16%和84%分位数。水平带表示水母尾和星系团纤维结构的观测比值。下：云尾中 \(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\) 随云演化时间（以云夹带时间 \(t_{entrain}\) 归一化）的变化。由于面亮度是在相同的投影尾面积上测量的，因此 \(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\sim\left.{SB}_{X}\right/{SB}_{H\alpha}\) 。在云演化早期且云尚未碎裂时，\(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\) 很小。然而，一旦图1中分析的“茧中团块”形态形成（绿色水平带），\(\left.L_{X}\right/L_{H\alpha}\) 就接近观测值 \(\sim 3\)，并在云夹带后保持时间稳定。我们将在第3.3节进一步讨论对云演化阶段和分辨率的稳健性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Mass-weighted PDFs of the residence time \(t_{X}\) in the X-ray-emitting temperature band, defined as \(10^{6}\,{K}<T<8\times 10^{6}\,{K}\) and containing \(\simeq 90\%\) of the total X-ray emission. The distribution is measured using an Eulerian passive scalar that is incremented by \(\Delta t\) every timestep while gas remains in the X-ray band and reset to zero otherwise. Black shows the fiducial run with \(P/k_{B}=3\times 10^{4}\,{K\,cm^{-3}}\) , which is appropriate for jellyfish galaxies; brown and blue shows lower and higher pressure runs with \(P/k_{B}=10^{3},10^{6}\,{K\,cm^{-3}}\) , representative of galactic winds and cluster-center filaments. Vertical dashed lines mark the corresponding cooling times \(t_{cool}(T_{X})\) . In all three runs, the residence-time distribution lies well to the left of \(t_{cool}(T_{X})\) , showing that gas is rapidly processed through the X-ray-emitting band by turbulent mixing before it can cool radiatively. The shift across the three PDFs further suggests that \(t_{X}\) scales roughly inversely with pressure, which leaves \({SB_{X}/SB_{H\alpha}}\) roughly constant with pressure.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在X射线发射温度区间内驻留时间 \(t_{X}\) 的质量加权概率密度函数，该温度区间定义为 \(10^{6}\,{K}<T<8\times 10^{6}\,{K}\)，包含总X射线发射的 \(\simeq 90\%\)。该分布通过欧拉被动标量测量，该标量在气体处于X射线波段时每个时间步增加 \(\Delta t\)，否则重置为零。黑色表示基准运行，其 \(P/k_{B}=3\times 10^{4}\,{K\,cm^{-3}}\)，适用于水母星系；棕色和蓝色分别表示较低和较高压力运行，其 \(P/k_{B}=10^{3},10^{6}\,{K\,cm^{-3}}\)，代表星系风和星系团中心纤维结构。垂直虚线标记相应的冷却时间 \(t_{cool}(T_{X})\)。在所有三次运行中，驻留时间分布均位于 \(t_{cool}(T_{X})\) 的左侧，表明气体在辐射冷却之前，通过湍流混合被快速处理通过X射线发射波段。三个概率密度函数之间的偏移进一步表明 \(t_{X}\) 大致与压力成反比，这使得 \({SB_{X}/SB_{H\alpha}}\) 随压力大致保持恒定。
